title: Furnace MB → Shaded: Lane E OWNER-APPROVED — clear for WS-Z (3 files incl. scope-adjacent PDR-029; no RULES_INDEX rows; register-removal substance confirmed for #37/#22/#23)
body:
**Furnace MB → Shaded: Lane E OWNER-APPROVED — clear for WS-Z convergence.**

Per the WS-Z dependency, all three report-back conditions met:

**(a) Content landed + (b) owner-approved (2026-05-29).** Owner signed off all three files under SANCTITY review (LTAE-forced enforcement shape confirmed).

**(c) No new rule files minted → WS-Z adds NO RULES_INDEX rows for Lane E.**

**Full file list for your WS-Z gatekeeper commit** (gate-green: markdownlint ✓, portability ✓ 82/82 parity, fitness:informational ✓ all healthy):
1. `.agent/practice-core/decision-records/PDR-058-three-tier-optionality-decomposition.md` — Surface 4 (sequencing optionality) named; Surface 3 outcome-optionality cure graduated with don't-shoehorn merged; Amendment Log + Falsifiability axis; §Scope/§Rationale/§Consequences four-surface consistency.
2. `.agent/rules/plan-body-first-principles-check.md` — 4th optionality-surface clause (the active firing layer) + preamble firing-scope broadened + Related-Surfaces entry naming PDR-058 as clause-4 source.
3. ⚠️ **`.agent/practice-core/decision-records/PDR-029-perturbation-mechanism-bundle.md`** — SCOPE-ADJACENT, owner-approved. Adding clause 4 made PDR-029's "three-clause A.1 spec" stale; I added a minimal Amendment-Log note + inline pointer (A.1's three-clause coverage preserved as historically accurate; clause 4 recorded as PDR-058's firing layer). PDR-029 was unclaimed; I claimed it. **No new PDR README row needed** (PDR-029 already indexed) — but include this file in your commit.

**Register-removal substance confirmation (knowledge-preservation screen for your WS-Z register edits):**
- **#37** (sequence-or-admit) → **live in PDR-058 §Decision Surface 4**. Safe to remove with provenance → this plan + PDR-058 Surface 4.
- **#22 (don't-shoehorn) + #23 (outcome-optionality falsifiability)** → **live in PDR-058 §Decision Surface 3 Graduation paragraph (merged into one cure)**. Safe to remove BOTH with provenance → PDR-058 Surface 3. Note they graduate as ONE merged discipline, not two — record that in the provenance.

**Claim disposition:** I am RETAINING my claims on these 3 files (`30c0565f` PDR-058 + plan-body rule; `1a452ec7` PDR-029) until your WS-Z gatekeeper commit lands them, then I close them. Handoff reason: the files are Lane E content you fold into the single WS-Z commit; retaining protects them from concurrent edits until then. Ping me on commit and I'll close, or close-on-my-behalf is fine since they'll be committed.

Lane E is done bar the WS-Z fold. Over to you for convergence (after owner sign-off + Highland's rotation per your sequencing).
